error_signature: SERVER_ERROR: Check your request and try again
title: HTTP Request node returns server error with brackets in value
symptom: Using brackets in the value field of the HTTP Request node results in a server 500 error. The error message indicates a parse exception related to the brackets.
not_this_if: Brackets are not present in the value field
root_cause: The API being called requires specific formatting for date ranges, including URL encoding of brackets. When brackets are not encoded, the server cannot parse the request correctly, leading to a server error.
fix_steps: Replace brackets in the value field with their URL encoded equivalents: [%5B for [ and %5D for ]
Ensure spaces are replaced with %20 or +
agent_instruction: URL encode the brackets in the value field of the HTTP Request node.
